description: An analyst must identify 'dark vessels' (ships that have turned off their AIS transponders) in a high-traffic shipping lane.

nodes.task_description: Ingest live AIS transponder data for the specified region.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst has a real-time feed of all broadcasting vessels.

nodes.task_description: Ingest live satellite radar imagery of the same region.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst has a real-time feed of all physical vessels detected by radar.

nodes.task_description: Correlate the two data feeds and flag any radar contact that does not have a corresponding AIS signal as a 'dark vessel' anomaly.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully identifies all vessels attempting to hide their position.
